title: Rustic Spring Slovakian Boudin Noir Pilaf
description: A light and earthy Slovakian dish featuring boudin noir and rest meat, perfect for spring, served in a bento box. This macrobiotic friendly meal is a great way to welcome the new season.

ingredients.name: mixed spring vegetables
ingredients.notes: such as peas, carrots, and onions

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the sliced boudin noir and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the diced rest meat and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the mixed spring vegetables and cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
Add the cooked brown rice to the skillet and stir to combine.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Transfer the pilaf to a bento box and garnish with chopped fresh parsley.
